title: Support - Help Guide
scenario: Help Guide opens from Support section in App Settings and Cancel returns to Support screen
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
5. Tap Cancel (X) on the help screen.
expected: Step 4: User is redirected to the Poly Lens Mobile online help page. Step 5: Tapping Cancel (X) dismisses the help screen and returns the user to the Support screen.
